briefdescription.para: I2C bus for MC6000 and IDT.

memberdef.name: ColorFormats
memberdef.initializer:
= {
{XVIDC_CSF_MEM_RGBX8, XVIDC_CSF_RGB, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_YUVX8, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_444, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_YUYV8, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_422, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_RGBX10, XVIDC_CSF_RGB, 10}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_YUVX10, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_444, 10}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_Y_UV8, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_422, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_Y_UV8_420, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_420, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_RGB8, XVIDC_CSF_RGB, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_YUV8, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_444, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_Y_UV10, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_422, 10}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_Y_UV10_420, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_420, 10}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_Y8, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_444, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_Y10, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_444, 10}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_BGRX8, XVIDC_CSF_RGB, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_UYVY8, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_422, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_RGBX12, XVIDC_CSF_RGB, 12}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_RGB16, XVIDC_CSF_RGB, 16}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_YUVX12, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_444, 12}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_Y_UV12, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_422, 12}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_YUV16, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_444, 16}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_Y_UV16, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_422, 16}, }

briefdescription.para: This function configures Frame Buffer for defined mode.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if init is OK else XST_FAILURE

inbodydescription.para: < Stop frameBuffer if Tx is lost

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Video Phy configured successfully.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 RegisterAddress, u32 Value)
memberdef.name: Dp21RxSs_PtMst_I2cWriteFreq

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 RegisterAddress, u8 Value)
memberdef.name: Dp21RxSs_PtMst_I2cWriteTdp2004

briefdescription.para: This is the main function for XDpRxSs pass-through example.

detaileddescription.para: If the Dp21RxSs_PtMst_Main function which setup the system succeeds, this function will wait for the interrupts.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if the interrupt example was unsuccessful.

simplesect.para: Unless setup failed, main will never return since DpRxSs_Main is blocking (it is waiting on interrupts).

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, int LineRate, XVphy_PllType Pll, XVphy_ChannelId Channel, XVphy_DirectionType Dir)
memberdef.name: Dp21RxSs_PtMst_PhyConfig

briefdescription.para: This function sets VPHY based on the linerate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy instance.
is an instance to the XVphy_PllType.
is an instance to the XVphy_ChannelId.
is an instance to the XVphy_DirectionType.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when DisplayPort Subsystem core requires delay or sleep.

detaileddescription.para: It provides timer with predefined amount of loop iterations.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

briefdescription.para: This function Calculates CRC values of Video components.

parameterdescription.para: is base address of the I2C.

briefdescription.para: This function reads DP141 VFMC- IIC.

parameterdescription.para: is base address of the I2C.
is address of the I2C slave device.
is register address of the I2C slave device.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u16 RegisterAddress, u8 Value)
memberdef.name: Dp21RxSs_PtMst_I2cWriteDp141

briefdescription.para: This function initialize required platform specific peripherals.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if required peripherals are initialized and configured successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the interrupt system so interrupts can occur for the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

detaileddescription.para: The function is application-specific since the actual system may or may not have an interrupt controller. The DPTX Subsystem core could be directly connected to a processor without an interrupt controller. The user should modify this function to fit the application.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if interrupt setup was successful.
A specific error code defined in "xstatus.h" if an error occurs.

briefdescription.para: This function configures Frame BufferWr for defined mode.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if init is OK else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function configures Frame Buffer for defined mode The Frame Buffer is put in Autorestart mode for non-Adaptive Sync mode When Adaptive Sync mode is enabled the FrameBuffer is put in manual mode.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if init is OK else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function reads a register value using XDp_ReadReg for MST operations.

parameterdescription.para: - The base address of the DP core
- The register offset to read from

simplesect.para: The 32-bit value read from the register
This is a wrapper function for XDp_ReadReg specifically for MST-related register reads

briefdescription.para: This function writes a register value using XDp_WriteReg for MST operations.

parameterdescription.para: - The base address of the DP core
- The register offset to write to
- The 32-bit value to write to the register

simplesect.para: This is a wrapper function for XDp_WriteReg specifically for MST-related register writes
